blocks.title: Parsons Dance At Joyce Theater
blocks.body:
📍 Parsons Dance at Joyce Theater
175 8th Ave, New York, NY 10011, USA

blocks.title: Arrival
blocks.body:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Athletic and joyful contemporary dance with two world premieres and the beloved 'Caught' (where a dancer appears to freeze mid-air in strobe light). April 29-May 10, overlaps NYC trip. Great date night or solo experience.
